global.description: The ad features a dark background with a central focus on a blank screen and prominent text.
global.main_message: Order dinner quickly with free delivery over $15.

elements.label: Dark background
elements.description: A solid dark background that fills the entire canvas, providing a contrasting backdrop for the text and elements.

elements.label: Empty screen
elements.description: A rectangular area resembling a blank screen or device display, positioned at the center with a simple outline.

elements.label: Top area
elements.description: A section at the top of the ad that is visually distinct but lacks specific identifiable features.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A button at the bottom center with a simple design, inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes text
elements.description: Bold, prominent text in the center of the ad that communicates the main offer clearly.

elements.label: Delivery offer text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main offer, providing additional information about free delivery conditions.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Free delivery over $15

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: A simple logo positioned at the top left, featuring the brand name in a clean font.

elements.label: Claim reward text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad encouraging users to claim a reward, designed to attract attention.
